name: iac
appliesWhen: any infra agent runs, OR the project provisions cloud resources

officialRepos.name: aws/aws-cdk
officialRepos.why: AWS CDK source + construct library. Default IaC for the TypeScript/AWS stack.

officialRepos.name: cdk-patterns/serverless
officialRepos.why: Well-architected CDK patterns (TS/Python) for Lambda, API GW, DynamoDB, EventBridge.

officialRepos.name: cdklabs/cdk-nag
officialRepos.why: Fails CDK synth on insecure/non-compliant resources (AWS Solutions, HIPAA, PCI rule packs).

officialRepos.name: hashicorp/terraform
officialRepos.why: Terraform core. Use for multi-cloud / portability requirements.

officialRepos.name: terraform-aws-modules
officialRepos.why: Community-maintained, production-grade reusable AWS modules (vpc, rds, eks, lambda, s3).

officialRepos.name: aws-ia
officialRepos.why: AWS-published Terraform modules and reference architectures.
